Draft is at `runtime/drafts/desmond-cole-reply.md` and queued for your approval at `runtime/queue/approvals/desmond-cole-reply.md`.

**Situation:** Desmond's $1,800 ask is below the $2,500 engagement floor. His intro call notes say he wanted a 6-week intensive anyway, so the draft declines the package and redirects him to the 6-week intensive at $3,000. No pushback on the relationship, just a clean redirect.
